channel.title: CrateDigger Blog
channel.description: Guides, comparisons, and release notes from CrateDigger.

item.title: Introducing CrateDigger 0.9
item.description: A hardware-inspired way to manage your offline music is here — free and open source.

item.title: Swinsian vs. CrateDigger vs. Foobar2000: Native macOS Music Library Managers in 2026
item.description: Comparing native macOS music library managers on conversion, organization, and price.

item.title: How to Batch-Convert and Organize a Messy Music Library on macOS
item.description: A step-by-step cleanup guide: formats, folder structure, and avoiding overwritten files.
